analysis.primary_subject: Kitchen cabinetry and countertops in a mid-renovation state

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - [Cabinet alignment appears straight but some gaps are visible]
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - [Surfaces are mostly smooth but some areas show rough edges and dust]
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - [Visible attention to alignment but some finishing details are incomplete]

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image captures a kitchen renovation in progress, showcasing the assembly of modern modular cabinetry and stainless steel countertops. The focus is on the precision and alignment of the cabinetry units before final finishing touches are applied.
